state.next-action: `12-02` is now complete. `/portal/ops/users` and `/portal/ops/customers` both ship as app-owned staff and customer administration surfaces, the staff portal route family is canonical under `/portal/ops/*`, customer admin covers primary-customer, portal-access, and Stripe repair or resync actions, and staff admin now includes first-party entitlement locks per membership in addition to role-template, invite, suspend, restore, and provider-resync controls. Advance to `12-03`: implement provider adapters and reconciliation so Clerk webhooks, membership sync, and outbound first-party domain events stay behind app-owned contracts. Verification note: focused tests and eslint passed for the entitlement-lock slice; local `next build` reached `Collecting build traces ...` and did not finish within the available window after cache cleanup.
